panels.description: Total Connected Peers for both inbound and outbound (per peer).

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id) (aptos_connections{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod"})

panels.title: Total Connected Peers (Inbound + Outbound)

panels.description: Total Inbound connected peers (i.e., peers that have dialed us).

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id) (aptos_connections{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", direction="inbound"})

panels.title: Inbound Connected Peers

panels.description: Total outbound connections (i.e., peers that we've dialed).

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(aptos_connections{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", direction="outbound"})

panels.title: Outbound Connected Peers

panels.description: The number of rejected inbound connections (per second).
panels.title: Rejected Inbound Connections (per second)

panels.description: Value is > 0 if there is a mismatch between onchain and actual network key on the interface

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id) (aptos_network_key_mismatch{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod"})

panels.title: Network Key Mismatches

panels.description: Inbound number of bytes received on the network

panels.description: Outbound number of bytes sent on the network

targets.expr: rate(sum by(namespace, pod, role_type) (aptos_network_app_inbound_traffic_sum{environment=~"$environment", namespace=~"$namespace",role_type=~"_type", network_id=~"$network_id", pod=~"$pod", cluster=~"$cluster"}))[1m]

panels.title: Total Network Inbound bytes (bytes/s)

panels.description: Total number of outbound bytes received on the network

targets.expr: rate(sum by(namespace, pod, role_type) (aptos_network_app_outbound_traffic_sum{environment=~"$environment", namespace=~"$namespace",role_type=~"_type", network_id=~"$network_id", pod=~"$pod", cluster=~"$cluster"}))[1m]

panels.title: Total Network Outbound bytes (bytes/s)

targets.expr: sum by(namespace, pod, role_type) (rate(aptos_network_app_inbound_traffic_count{environment=~"$environment", namespace=~"$namespace",role_type=~"_type", network_id=~"$network_id", pod=~"$pod", cluster=~"$cluster"}[1m]))

panels.title: Total Network Inbound messages (messages/s)

targets.expr: sum by(namespace, pod, role_type) (rate(aptos_network_app_outbound_traffic_count{environment=~"$environment", namespace=~"$namespace",role_type=~"_type", network_id=~"$network_id", pod=~"$pod", cluster=~"$cluster"}[1m]))

panels.description: The rate of new inbound connections on the network interface

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id) (rate(aptos_network_pending_connection_upgrades{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", direction="inbound" }[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: Inbound Pending Connection Upgrades

panels.description: The rate of new outbound connections on the network interface

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id) (rate(aptos_network_pending_connection_upgrades{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", direction="outbound" }[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: Outbound Pending Connection Upgrades

panels.description: Latency of Inbound connection upgrades

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id, le) (rate(aptos_network_connection_upgrade_time_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.title: Inbound Connection Upgrade Latency [P50]

panels.description: Latency of Outbound connection upgrades

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id, le) (rate(aptos_network_connection_upgrade_time_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", direction="outbound",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.title: Outbound Connection Upgrade Latency [P50]

panels.description: Latency of Inbound connection upgrades

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id, le) (rate(aptos_network_connection_upgrade_time_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.title: Inbound Connection Upgrade Latency [P90]

panels.description: Latency of Outbound connection upgrades

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id, le) (rate(aptos_network_connection_upgrade_time_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", direction="outbound",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.title: Outbound Connection Upgrade Latency [P90]

panels.description: Latency of Inbound connection upgrades

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id, le) (rate(aptos_network_connection_upgrade_time_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.title: Inbound Connection Upgrade Latency [P99]

panels.description: Latency of Outbound connection upgrades

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id, le) (rate(aptos_network_connection_upgrade_time_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", direction="outbound",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.title: Outbound Connection Upgrade Latency [P99]

targets.expr: sum by(network_id, role_type, pod) (rate(aptos_network_rpc_messages{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",type="request",state="failed"}[$AggInterval])) / sum by(network_id, role_type, pod) (rate(aptos_network_rpc_messages{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",type="request",state=~"(sent|failed)"}[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: RPC Total Request Error Rate (% requests in error)

targets.expr: sum by(network_id, role_type, pod) (rate(aptos_network_rpc_messages{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",type="response",state="failed"}[$AggInterval])) / sum by(network_id, role_type, pod) (rate(aptos_network_rpc_messages{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type",pod=~"$pod",type="request",state="received"}[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: RPC Total Response Error Rate (% responses in error)

panels.description: Total throughput of all Outbound RPC requests per peer

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id) (rate(aptos_network_rpc_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="sent"}[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: Throughput of Total Outbound RPCs (bytes/s)

panels.description: Total throughput of all Inbound RPC requests per peer

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_rpc_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="received"}[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: Throughput of Total Inbound RPCs (bytes/s)

panels.description: Total number of all Outbound RPC requests per peer

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_rpc_messages{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", type="request",state="sent"}[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: Rate of Total Outbound RPCs (msg/s)

panels.description: Total number of all Inbound RPC requests per peer

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_rpc_messages{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", type="request", state="received"}[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: Rate of Total Inbound RPCs (msg/s)

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by(pod, network_id, role_type, le)(rate(aptos_network_outbound_rpc_request_latency_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", protocol_id=~"$rpc_protocol",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type"}[$AggInterval])))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by(pod, network_id, role_type, le)(rate(aptos_network_inbound_rpc_handler_latency_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", protocol_id=~"$rpc_protocol",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type"}[$AggInterval])))

histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by(pod, network_id, role_type, le)(rate(aptos_network_outbound_rpc_request_latency_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", protocol_id=~"$rpc_protocol",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type"}[$AggInterval])))

histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by(pod, network_id, role_type, le)(rate(aptos_network_inbound_rpc_handler_latency_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", protocol_id=~"$rpc_protocol",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type"}[$AggInterval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(pod, network_id, role_type, le)(rate(aptos_network_outbound_rpc_request_latency_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", protocol_id=~"$rpc_protocol",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type"}[$AggInterval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(pod, network_id, role_type, le)(rate(aptos_network_inbound_rpc_handler_latency_seconds_bucket{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", protocol_id=~"$rpc_protocol",pod=~"$pod",network_id=~"$network_id",role_type=~"_type"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.description: Total throughput of all Outbound Direct Send requests per peer

targets.expr: avg(sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="sent"}[$AggInterval])))

quantile(0.5, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="sent"}[$AggInterval])))

quantile(0.9, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="sent"}[$AggInterval])))

quantile(0.99, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="sent"}[$AggInterval])))

quantile(0.1, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="sent"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.title: Throughput of Total Outbound Direct Sends (bytes/s)

panels.description: Total throughput of all Inbound Direct Send requests per peer

targets.expr: avg(sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="received"}[$AggInterval])))

quantile(0.5, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="received"}[$AggInterval])))

quantile(0.9, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="received"}[$AggInterval])))

quantile(0.99, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="received"}[$AggInterval])))

quantile(0.1, sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_bytes{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="received"}[$AggInterval])))

panels.title: Throughput of Total Inbound Direct Sends (bytes/s)

panels.description: Total number of all Outbound Direct Send requests per peer

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_messages{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="sent"}[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: Rate of Total Outbound Direct Sends (msg/s)

panels.description: Total number of all Inbound Direct Send requests per peer

targets.expr: sum by(pod, role_type, network_id)(rate(aptos_network_direct_send_messages{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~"$network_id", role_type=~"_type", pod=~"$pod", state="received"}[$AggInterval]))

panels.title: Rate of Total Inbound Direct Sends (msg/s)

targets.expr: sum by(pod) (rate(haproxy_frontend_connections_total{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~".*", pod=~".*"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by(pod, __name__) (rate({environment=~"$environment", __name__=~"haproxy_.*denied.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", network_id=~".*", pod=~".*"}[$__rate_interval]))
